scenes.title: A slow start
scenes.intro: Nothing is on your calendar. Two overnight notifications are waiting.

choices.label: Maya: Anyone doing anything today?
choices.headline: Saturday group
choices.beforeClaim: Maya: Morning! I fell into a survey rabbit hole last night. Apparently
choices.afterClaim: Alex: That is incredibly specific. Also, is anyone free for lunch?

choices.label: Your Saturday morning briefing is ready
choices.headline: Five things for a quiet Saturday
choices.beforeClaim: Between the weather and local transport updates, the briefing notes that
choices.afterClaim: The final card lists three free events happening around the city today.
choices.response: Morning Brief was added to your reading history.

scenes.title: Breakfast
scenes.intro: You have time to make something or head to a nearby café.

choices.label: Recipes: Your saved pancakes take 20 minutes
choices.headline: One-bowl pancakes
choices.beforeClaim: The recipe editor recommends resting the batter and adds that
choices.afterClaim: The ingredient list and a six-step method appear below.
choices.response: One-bowl pancakes was added to Today’s cooking activity.

choices.label: Maps: Linden Corner is quiet right now
choices.headline: A table without the wait
choices.beforeClaim: A highlighted review praises the breakfast menu and mentions that
choices.afterClaim: The live panel shows plenty of tables and no reported wait.
choices.response: Walking directions to Linden Corner were saved to Recent Trips.

scenes.title: Getting across town
scenes.intro: Your phone has noticed two reasonable routes toward the centre.

choices.label: Transit: Bus 24 arrives in 4 minutes
choices.headline: Service update
choices.beforeClaim: The onboard-information preview includes a short community survey: “
choices.afterClaim: ” Route 24 is otherwise running to schedule.
choices.response: A Route 24 mobile ticket was added to Wallet.

choices.label: Maps: Riverside walking route adds 12 minutes
choices.headline: Walk via Riverside Park
choices.beforeClaim: The route guide describes the gardens and notes that
choices.afterClaim: The path is mostly flat and passes two places marked as good viewpoints.
choices.response: Riverside Park was added to Recent Trips and today’s step count increased.

scenes.title: Something to explore
scenes.intro: Local Guide has two nearby suggestions based on where you arrived.

choices.label: Local Guide: Riverside Market is open
choices.headline: Saturday stalls by the river
choices.beforeClaim: The guide highlights a tea stall whose profile says
choices.afterClaim: The market page also lists live music at 11 and a bakery near the east entrance.
choices.response: Riverside Market was saved to Places Visited.

choices.label: Tickets: Free entry at the East Room Gallery
choices.headline: Pictures of ordinary life
choices.beforeClaim: The digital exhibition guide introduces the photographer’s interest in routines, observing that
choices.afterClaim: Free timed entry is available for the next hour.
choices.response: A 10:20 gallery pass was added to Wallet.

scenes.title: Lunch nearby
scenes.intro: You check what is close before deciding where to stop.

choices.label: Nearby: Mason’s Deli has no wait
choices.headline: Popular nearby
choices.beforeClaim: A recent reviewer recommends the window seats and writes, “The menu has a tiny fact saying
choices.afterClaim: ” Other reviews repeatedly mention the soup and lemon cake.
choices.response: Mason’s Deli was added to Recent Places.

choices.label: Alex: Still want to get lunch?
choices.headline: Lunch?
choices.beforeClaim: Alex: I can meet near the park. Also, our work newsletter claims
choices.afterClaim: Alex: No idea why they included that. I can be there in fifteen.
choices.response: You shared your location with Alex for one hour.

scenes.title: An open afternoon
scenes.intro: Two things you saved earlier are available now.

choices.label: Cinema: The 2:25 matinee has seats
choices.headline: The Things We Do
choices.beforeClaim: Over shots of kitchens and city streets, the trailer narrator says, “
choices.afterClaim: ” The documentary starts in fifteen minutes.
choices.response: A matinee ticket and digital receipt were added to Wallet.

choices.label: Reader: Continue “Why small habits stick”
choices.headline: Why small habits stick
choices.beforeClaim: A sidebar summarising a recent survey reports that
choices.afterClaim: The article then asks three people which routines make a place feel like home.
choices.response: The article was marked finished in Reading History.

scenes.title: One useful stop
scenes.intro: A shopping reminder appears as you start thinking about heading home.

choices.label: Reminders: 4 items left on Groceries
choices.headline: Your shared shopping list
choices.beforeClaim: A suggested pantry item opens to its product page, which notes that
choices.afterClaim: The page shows ingredients, storage instructions, and two nearby prices.
choices.response: Four grocery items were checked off your list.

choices.label: Bookshop: Your reserved title is ready
choices.headline: Ready for pickup
choices.beforeClaim: The pickup email includes a staff note about the reserved essay collection: “It opens with the finding that
choices.afterClaim: ” Your reservation will be held until tomorrow evening.
choices.response: The pickup confirmation was added to Wallet.

scenes.title: Evening
scenes.intro: You are home. Two things saved during the day are ready when you are.

choices.label: Podcasts: Alex’s episode is next in queue
choices.headline: The habits we share
choices.beforeClaim: Halfway through the episode, the host tells her guest, “One survey found that
choices.afterClaim: ” The guest wonders whether people report ideal habits rather than real ones.
choices.response: Episode 42 was marked played in Listening History.

choices.label: Watch: A documentary from your saved list
choices.headline: The Things We Do
choices.beforeClaim: The description follows ordinary people through a week and begins with the finding that
choices.afterClaim: The film promises a warm look at routines people share without noticing.
choices.response: The documentary was added to Up Next.
